creator: canardo909@gmx.com
text:
Problem found when building sysutils/libcdio-paranoia on FreeBSD 12.1-RELEASE-p1 powerpc 32 bit, running on Apple Powerbook 17". 
(sysutils/libcdio-paranoia is required to build x11-wm/xfce4)



# cd /usr/ports/sysutils/libcdio-paranoia/
# make install clean
===>  Building for libcdio-paranoia-10.2+2.0.1
gmake[1]: Entering directory '/usr/ports/sysutils/libcdio-paranoia/work/libcdio-paranoia-10.2+2.0.1'
gmake  all-recursive
.....
.....
gmake[3]: Entering directory '/usr/ports/sysutils/libcdio-paranoia/work/libcdio-paranoia-10.2+2.0.1/lib'
Making all in cdda_interface
gmake[4]: Entering directory '/usr/ports/sysutils/libcdio-paranoia/work/libcdio-paranoia-10.2+2.0.1/lib/cdda_interface'
/bin/sh ../../libtool  --tag=CC   --mode=compile cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I../..  -I../../include -I../../include/ -I/usr/local/include  -isystem /usr/local/include  -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector-strong -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing  -Wall -Wchar-subscripts -Wmissing-prototypes -Wmissing-declarations -Wunused -Wpointer-arith -Wwrite-strings -Wnested-externs -Wno-sign-compare -MT toc.lo -MD -MP -MF .deps/toc.Tpo -c -o toc.lo toc.c
libtool: compile:  cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I../.. -I../../include -I../../include/ -I/usr/local/include -isystem /usr/local/include -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector-strong -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -Wchar-subscripts -Wmissing-prototypes -Wmissing-declarations -Wunused -Wpointer-arith -Wwrite-strings -Wnested-externs -Wno-sign-compare -MT toc.lo -MD -MP -MF .deps/toc.Tpo -c toc.c  -fPIC -DPIC -o .libs/toc.o
In file included from toc.c:30:
../../include/cdio/paranoia/toc.h:23: error: redefinition of typedef 'cdrom_paranoia_t'
../../include/cdio/paranoia/cdda.h:40: error: previous declaration of 'cdrom_paranoia_t' was here
../../include/cdio/paranoia/toc.h:24: error: redefinition of typedef 'cdrom_drive_t'
../../include/cdio/paranoia/cdda.h:41: error: previous declaration of 'cdrom_drive_t' was here
gmake[4]: *** [Makefile:568: toc.lo] Error 1
gmake[4]: Leaving directory '/usr/ports/sysutils/libcdio-paranoia/work/libcdio-paranoia-10.2+2.0.1/lib/cdda_interface'
gmake[3]: *** [Makefile:377: all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[3]: Leaving directory '/usr/ports/sysutils/libcdio-paranoia/work/libcdio-paranoia-10.2+2.0.1/lib'
gmake[2]: *** [Makefile:503: all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory '/usr/ports/sysutils/libcdio-paranoia/work/libcdio-paranoia-10.2+2.0.1'
gmake[1]: *** [Makefile:408: all] Error 2
gmake[1]: Leaving directory '/usr/ports/sysutils/libcdio-paranoia/work/libcdio-paranoia-10.2+2.0.1'
